feat.name: Springsoul
feat.text: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as fresh blossoms, spring fruits, and the seeds of new life, and you harness this power to spread vitality and abundance. You can cast the *tangle vine* cantrip as an innate primal or arcane spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Ardande
traits.text: Ardandes are planar scions descended from kizidhar and other beings of elemental wood.

traits.name: Lineage
traits.text: A feat with this trait indicates a character’s descendance from a particular type of creature. You can have only one lineage feat. You can select a lineage feat only at 1st level, and you can’t retrain into or out of these feats.
